author: Rubtsowa
text:
Need add new parameters and functions in class DMatrix

The task will be solved in stages.

1. support parameters `feature_names`, `feature_types`, `feature_weights`, `silent`, `nthread`, `label_lower_bound`, `label_upper_bound`, `enable_categorical`
2. support parameter `weight`
3. support parameter `base_margin`
4. support parameter `missing`
5. support parameter `group`
6. support parameter `qid`
